content.text:
Introduction to Physics

Physics is the natural science that studies matter, its motion and behavior through space and time, and the related entities of energy and force.

What You'll Learn:

  • Understanding the physical world
  • Basic concepts of motion and energy
  • Forces and their effects
  • Scientific method in physics

Key Concepts:

  • Matter - Anything that has mass and takes up space
  • Energy - The ability to do work
  • Force - A push or pull on an object
  • Motion - Change in position over time
content.task: Identify examples of forces in your daily life
